scripts.kill:3000: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } } catch {} ; exit 0"
